inputs.label: Initial Capital Gain
inputs.businessContext: The amount of capital gain being invested into the Qualified Opportunity Fund.

businessContext_i18n.en: The amount of capital gain being invested into the Qualified Opportunity Fund.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nitelikli Fırsat Fonu'na yatırılan sermaye kazancı tutarı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Betrag des Kapitalgewinns, der in den Qualifizierten Chancenfonds investiert wird
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant du gain en capital investi dans le fonds d'opportunité qualifié.
businessContext_i18n.es: Monto de la ganancia de capital invertido en el Fondo de Oportunidad Calificado

inputs.label: Federal Capital Gains Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Combined federal capital gains tax rate including net investment income tax if applicable.

label_i18n.fr: Taux d'imposition fédéral des gains en capital
label_i18n.es: Tasa federal de impuesto a las ganancias de capital

businessContext_i18n.en: Combined federal capital gains tax rate including net investment income tax if applicable.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varsa net yatırım geliri vergisi dahil birleşik federal sermaye kazancı vergi oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kombinierter Bundessteuersatz auf Kapitalerträge inkl. Nettoinvestitionsertragsteuer, falls zutreffend.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'imposition fédéral combiné des gains en capital, incluant la taxe sur les revenus de placement nets si applicable.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa federal combinada de impuesto a las ganancias de capital, incluido el impuesto a la renta neta de inversiones si corresponde.

label_i18n.fr: Taux d'imposition des gains en capital de l'État
label_i18n.es: Tasa estatal de impuesto a las ganancias de capital

businessContext_i18n.tr: Eyalet düzeyinde sermaye kazancı vergi oranı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'imposition des gains en capital au niveau de l'État.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa estatal de impuesto a las ganancias de capital.

inputs.label: Holding Period
inputs.businessContext: Number of years the investment is held in the Opportunity Fund.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of years the investment is held in the Opportunity Fund.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatırımın Fırsat Fonu'nda tutulduğu yıl sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Jahre, in denen die Investition im Opportunity Fund gehalten wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'années pendant lesquelles l'investissement est détenu dans le fonds d'opportunité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de años que la inversión se mantiene en el Fondo de Oportunidad.

inputs.label: Expected Annual Appreciation
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual rate of return on the Opportunity Fund investment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual rate of return on the Opportunity Fund investment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fırsat Fonu yatırımında beklenen yıllık getiri oranı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de rendement annuel attendu sur l'investissement dans le fonds d'opportunité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de rendimiento anual esperada de la inversión en el Fondo de Oportunidad.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
